title: Add notes in any cell.

posts.author: mihai.oprisenescu (Mihai Oprisenescu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday guys
I recommend to add notes at columns (head of the column)to put there instructions columns responsable persons , instructions , process, notes
because here is a lot of questions for new people using Monday ,that would facilitate the operation
Now, you cand add only in status cell, but is not helping. Would help to add notes also in number cell, or date cell and so on…

Thanks Mike
